insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs -13.5% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -7.9%, App Total Install -8.2%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 07-21 vs 07-14 = +7.8% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 07-14 vs 07-07 = +6.5% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCV surging (-9.4% vs upstream -49.9%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCV -9.4% vs upstream -49.9% (conversion surging); YCP -20.0% vs upstream -4.5% (conversion softening). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: App split — App Total Install -8.2% concentrated in YCV — not platform-wide.
insights.body: App Total Install -8.2% is uneven by app (All App -8.2%, YMK +4.5%, YCP -0.9%, YCV -100.0%) — driven mainly by YCV, not a platform-wide shift.

insights.title: Country outlier — JP is the outlier on App Total Revenue (+43.4% vs +1.2%).
insights.body: App Total Revenue · All App: JP +43.4% vs all-country +1.2% (Δ +42.1pp; ≈8% of revenue).

insights.title: Data gap — 14 slice(s) missing data — excluded from analysis.
insights.body: 14 slice(s) n/a (missing data): YAT·BR·App Total Revenue, YAT·CA·App Total Install, YAT·CA·App Total Revenue, YAT·DE·App Total New Subs ….
